subject: Project Management
title: Jeff Sutherland's First Scrum
description: Learn Jeff Sutherland's First Scrum in one minute.

hook.text: In 1993, Jeff Sutherland was hired to fix a failing project at Easel Corporation.

buildup.text: Inspired by the rugby paper, he organized his team into short cycles with daily check-ins.

discovery.text: The team delivered a working product in six months — on time and under budget.

twist.text: Sutherland was a former fighter pilot and statistician. He brought military precision to Agile chaos.

climax.text: Easel's success became the proof of concept. Scrum worked in practice, not just in theory.

punchline.text: A fighter pilot turned a rugby metaphor into a framework.
